# Bluebird — Browser Tools

> Bluebird is a free collection of privacy-first online tools that run entirely
> inside your browser. No uploads, no accounts, no tracking. Every file you
> process stays on your device.

## Why Bluebird is different

- All processing happens client-side using Web Workers and native browser APIs.
- No server ever sees your files, text or passwords.
- Free forever — no paywalls, no watermarks, no usage caps.
- Works on any modern browser, desktop or mobile.

## Tools

### Image
- [Image Compressor](/image-compressor): Shrink JPG, PNG and WEBP photos to a target size while keeping quality.
- [Image Resizer](/image-resizer): Resize photos to custom pixel dimensions or social-media presets (Instagram, YouTube, Twitter).
- [Image Cropper](/image-cropper): Crop to a square, 16:9, or any custom ratio with a live drag handle.
- [Rotate & Flip](/rotate-flip): Rotate by 90°, straighten with a slider, or mirror an image.
- [Format Converter](/image-format-converter): Convert between JPG, PNG, WEBP and BMP in one click.
- [Photo Watermark](/watermark): Add a text or logo watermark to one photo or a whole batch.
- [Color Picker](/color-picker): Read HEX/RGB/HSL from any pixel and extract a palette.
- [EXIF Viewer & Cleaner](/exif-viewer): See and remove hidden EXIF metadata (camera, date, GPS) before sharing.
- [Favicon Generator](/favicon-generator): Build a full favicon pack (16×16, 32×32, 180×180, .ico) from one image.

### Documents
- [Images to PDF](/images-to-pdf): Combine multiple photos into a single PDF with A4/Letter sizing.
- [PDF to Images](/pdf-to-images): Extract every page of a PDF as PNG, JPG or WEBP at custom DPI.

### Generators
- [QR Code Generator](/qr-generator): Make QR codes for links, Wi-Fi, vCards or plain text with custom colors. Export PNG/SVG/JPG.
- [Password Generator](/password-generator): Generate strong passwords or memorable passphrases using crypto.getRandomValues.

### Developer
- [JSON Formatter](/json-formatter): Pretty-print, validate, sort keys, minify, and convert JSON to YAML.
- [Base64 Encoder & Decoder](/base64): Encode/decode text or files, with URL-safe option and data-URL helper.
- [Text Case Converter](/text-case-converter): Switch between UPPER, lower, Title, camel, snake, kebab and 6 more cases.

## Pages
- [Home](/) — full tool index grouped by category.
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml) — machine-readable list of every page.
